_doc: Tasks listed here are PERMANENTLY LOCKED. The image pipeline (scripts/generate_image.py) reads this file on startup and refuses to process any locked task, no matter what - even with explicit --task <id> invocation, even if Image URL is cleared, even if status is changed. The lock exists because the task has an approved, human-blessed final image that must never be silently destroyed by a re-run. To unlock a task, remove its entry here (intentional human action). To validate a future change on a locked archetype, create a NEW throwaway task; never re-run a locked one.

locked_tasks.task_name: 2026-05-16 Constitutional Awareness TEST Sovereignty Quote FB
locked_tasks.reason: Original model-rendered image is the brand benchmark for constitutional_quote. The model's composed, framed, decorated rendering with integrated typography cannot be reproduced by Pillow overlay. Locked permanently after a Pillow-overlay re-run destroyed the canonical PNG on disk; the original was recovered from ClickUp CDN and restored.
